## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.4

### Camera Recording Notifications
- Adds a Home Assistant playback page for X-Sense SD recording events.
- Adds Home Assistant recording playback URLs to Motion event data when an SD playback record is available.
- Updates the camera event blueprint so the default mobile notification opens the recording URL directly through Home Assistant.
- Removes the fake fallback notification action when no playback URL is available.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for SD playback URL generation and blueprint notification targets.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this prerelease.
